metadata.description:
JSFX plugins for Reaper by Steve Cox.
Current plugins: - PsychoBass: Psychoacoustic bass enhancement
See https://github.com/stevewcox/SteveCoxJSFX for full documentation.

Psychoacoustic bass enhancement using timbre-matched harmonic generation.
Adds upper harmonics to bass signals so they remain audible on small speakers and earbuds, without the synthetic character of naive harmonic generators.
Based on published Virtual Bass System research (Ben-Tzur/Colloms AES 1999, Larsen & Aarts JAES 2002, Mu/Gan/Tan ICASSP 2013).
Controls: Frequency - Crossover point (40-200 Hz). Set just above your lowest note. Intensity - Harmonic generation amount (0-100%) Original Bass - Level of sub-bass in output (0-100%) Harmonics Mix - Blend of generated harmonics (0-100%) Output Gain - Output trim (-24 to +10 dB), wet signal only Harmonic Tilt - Roll-off of upper harmonics (0-8 dB/oct) Harmonic Style - Full (natural harmonic decay, perceptually bounded LP), Tight (focused low-mids, LP at 4.5x crossover freq), Bright (half-wave rectified blend, extended series) Bypass - Click-free dry/wet crossfade, automatable
Suggested starting point for bass guitar: Frequency: 85Hz, Intensity: 55%, Original Bass: 75%, Harmonics Mix: 60%, Tilt: 4dB, Style: Full

version.author: stevewcox
version.changelog:
v0.4.12 - Feedback state reset on bypass - fmL/fmR feedback state now decays to zero during bypass by multiplying by bypass_gain each sample — prevents stale transient state on re-engagement
v0.4.11 - NLD parameter update + comment cleanup - nld_drive=1.8, dc=0.78, k=0.28, harm_cal=5.0 (empirically tuned) - Removed all superseded NLD iteration history from source comments
v0.4.10 - Hard clip on feedback state replaced with soft limiter - y/(1+|y|/4) prevents runaway without distorting harmonic structure
v0.4.9 - Distortion safeguards - Envelope-scaled DC bias prevents background harmonics during silence - Safety clip tightened (superseded by soft limiter in v0.4.10)
v0.4.8 - NLD parameters tuned; tilt shelf raised to 7× freq
v0.4.7 - DC bias added to feedback multiplier for even harmonic generation
v0.4.6 - NLD replaced with recursive feedback multiplier - y[n] = x[n] * (1 + k * |y[n-1]|) — original MaxxBass architecture (patent US5930373, expired September 2019) - Recursive structure naturally extends harmonics to high frequencies
v0.4.0–0.4.5 - NLD exploration (polynomial and tanh, superseded by v0.4.6)
v0.3.8–0.3.9 - Calibration from clean 50Hz sine comparison - Harmonic LP moved to Tight mode only (Full/Bright LP-free) - Original Bass default reduced 70% → 50%
v0.3.7 - Reverted (bandpass HP change caused IMD)
v0.3.6 - Harmonic LP upgraded to 8th-order at 4× freq
v0.3.5 - Harmonic LP upgraded to 6th-order at 5× freq
v0.3.4 - Harmonic LP upgraded to 4th-order at 6× freq
v0.3.3 - Harmonic LP added (2nd-order at 10× freq)
v0.3.2 - NLD even-harmonic fix; harmonic HP moved to 1× freq; sub-bass bleed
v0.3.1 - orig_bass now scales only LP sub-bass, not full dry signal
v0.3.0 - Bandpass detection path; output crossover; compander removed
v0.2.x - NLD pre-gain normalisation, compander redesign, bypass slider
